mstList.name: Here's Where the Story Really Begins!
mstList.description: On enemy break, increases break bonus by 20% (2 turns) and SPD by 10% (1 turn).

mstList.name: This Is the Way of Ryushin-Ryu!
mstList.description:
On battle skill use, increases DMG dealt by 20% (2 turns).
On enemy break, increases ATK by 10% (2 turns).

mstList.name: I've Already Made My Move
mstList.description:
On basic attack, increases SPD by 15% (1 turn).
On battle skill use, increases all allies' ATK by 5% (2 turns).

mstList.name: Our Bond Gives Us Strength!
mstList.description:
On enemy break, increases critical rate by 10% (2 turns).
On battle skill use, increases break gauge depletion (2 turns).

mstList.name: I Can Do It... I Know I Can!
mstList.description: On enemy break, increases SPD by 20% (2 turns).

mstList.name: Let's Find a Four-Leaf Clover!
mstList.description:
Increases debuff effects applied by 20% (* excluding action order delay effects).
On battle skill use, decreases target's DEF by 5% (2 turns).
* Not affected by increases to debuff effects.

mstList.name: I Already Decided That I'm Going to Do It
mstList.description:
On taking at least 1 DMG from an enemy attack, decreases all allies' DMG taken by 5% (2 turns).
If under 80% HP, increases DEF by 10%.

mstList.name: Now Everything's Ruined!
mstList.description: On enemy break, increases break bonus by 35% (2 turns).

mstList.name: Time Is Money! Let's Make This Quick!
mstList.description:
Increases buff effects applied by 20% (* excluding MP recovery and action order advance effects).
On basic attack, increases SPD by 10% (1 turn). * Not affected by increases to buff effects.

mstList.name: To Protect My Family!
mstList.description:
On basic attack, advances action order by 10%.
If HP 50% or higher, increases DEF by 10%.

mstList.name: The Power Just Comes in like ZOOOM!
mstList.description:
On battle skill use, increases all allies' critical rate by 10% (2 turns).
On critical hit, increases all allies' SPD by 2% (Stacks 5 times / 2 turns).

mstList.name: Seek and Destroy, That's All There Is to It
mstList.description: On follow-up attack, increases ATK by 25% (2 turns).

mstList.name: Even a Gal Can Throw Down, You Know!
mstList.description: On battle skill use, increases SPD by 15% (2 turns).

mstList.name: I Can Handle It on My Own!
mstList.description:
On battle skill use, increases break gauge depletion (2 turns).
On basic attack, increases SPD by 10% (1 turn).

mstList.name: Now I'm Even More Kawaii
mstList.description: Increases follow-up attack DMG dealt by 40%.

mstList.name: I Would Move Forward
mstList.description:
At turn start, grants 1 Magic (1 time per battle).
On battle skill use, increases ATK by 20% (2 turns).

mstList.name: I'm All Grown up Now, Right?
mstList.description:
Increases HP recovery amount by 10% (2 turns).
If under 50% HP, decreases DMG taken by 10%.

mstList.name: Go For It!
mstList.description:
Increases buff effects applied by 20% (* excluding MP recovery and action order advance effects).
On basic attack, increases SPD by 10% (2 turns). * Not affected by increases to buff effects.

mstList.name: The Tale Is Only Getting Started!
mstList.description:
On battle skill use, increases ATK by 10% (2 turns).
If HP 50% or higher, increases ATK by 10%.

mstList.name: That Was an Easy Victory
mstList.description:
Increases break gauge depletion.
On enemy break, advances action order by 10%.

mstList.name: I'll Keep My Family Safe!
mstList.description:
Increases HP recovery amount by 10% for allies under 50% HP.
Increases max HP by 10%.

mstList.name: It's a Non-Binding Verbal Agreement!
mstList.description: Increases ATK by 8.8% and DMG dealt by 8.8%.

mstList.name: I Am the Magical Girl Born of Halloween!
mstList.description:
Increases special attack break gauge depletion.
Increases MP recovery rate by 10%.

mstList.name: Let's Fight Fair and Square!
mstList.description: If under 50% HP, increases ATK by 10% (Effect scales based on how low HP is; max 30%).

mstList.name: Battle Is Not Governed by Strength Alone
mstList.description:
On battle skill use, increases critical rate by 5% (Stacks 3 times).
On critical hit, advances action order by 10%.

mstList.name: Together We'll Be Okay!
mstList.description:
Increases max HP by 10%.
Increases HP recovery amount by 15% for allies under 50% HP.

mstList.name: I've Got to Change Who I Am, Bit by Bit!
mstList.description:
At turn start, grants 3 Magic (1 time per battle).
Increases follow-up attack break gauge depletion.

mstList.name: Here, Take My Hand!
mstList.description: Increases SPD by 5% (Effect scales based on how many enemies there are; max 25%).

mstList.name: I Won't Ignore My Heart Anymore
mstList.description:
Increases DEF by 10%.
If under 40% HP, decreases DMG taken by 20%.

mstList.name: Ain't It the Best When Your Head's a Mess?
mstList.description:
Increases ATK by 10%.
Increases ailment effects applied by self by 30%.

mstList.name: I've Got Enough Points on My Card!
mstList.description:
Decreases DMG taken by 20%.
On battle skill use, increases SPD by 20% (1 turn).

mstList.name: There's Only So Much You Can Do by Yourself
mstList.description:
On basic attack, increases SPD by 10% (1 turn).
On battle skill use, decreases DMG taken by 10% (1 turn).

mstList.name: I'm Not Gonna Lose! No Way, No Way, NO WAY!
mstList.description:
Increases MP recovery rate by 10%.
On battle skill use, increases SPD by 10% (2 turns).

mstList.name: I've Never Felt This Way Before
mstList.description:
Increases follow-up attack DMG dealt by 30%.
On follow-up attack, increases ATK by 5% (Stacks 5 times).

mstList.name: I'm a Feisty Gal!
mstList.description:
Increases buff effects applied by 20% (* excluding MP recovery and action order advance effects).
On battle skill use, advances action order by 10%.

mstList.name: I Can Help Too!
mstList.description:
Increases all allies' critical rate by 10%.
On critical hit, increases critical DMG by 5% (Stacks 3 times / 2 turns).

mstList.name: Your Dose of Kawaii!
mstList.description:
Increases break gauge depletion.
On follow-up attack, increases break bonus by 30% (2 turns).

mstList.name: I Swore...I Would Keep Going
mstList.description:
Increases ATK by 5% (Effect scales based on how many enemies there are; max 25%).
On battle skill use, advances action order by 10%.

mstList.name: I'll Fix You up as Many Times as It Takes!
mstList.description:
Increases HP recovery amount by 10%.
If under 40% HP, decreases DMG taken by 20%.

mstList.name: Don't Tell Anyone Else in Class, Okay?
mstList.description:
On enemy break, increases break bonus by 30% (2 turns).
Increases follow-up attack break gauge depletion.

mstList.name: I Found a Wish I Truly Want Granted
mstList.description:
On maxed enemy break bonus, grants 5 MP.
Increases HP recovery amount by 100%.

mstList.name: I Won't Rely on Anyone Anymore
mstList.description:
Increases follow-up attack DMG dealt by 40%.
On follow-up attack, advances action order by 10%.

mstList.name: With All of Us, There's No Way We Can Fail
mstList.description:
At battle start, increases critical rate by 30% (3 turns).
On battle skill use, increases SPD by 10% (2 turns).

mstList.name: The Weight of What You Bear Only Makes You Stronger
mstList.description:
Increases critical rate by 20%
On critical hit, increases SPD by 15% (2 turns).

mstList.name: I Am the Mightiest Magical Girl!
mstList.description:
Increases all allies' DMG dealt when targeting elemental weakness by 15%. * Not affected by increases to buff effects.
On basic attack, increases own SPD by 10% (1 turn). * Not affected by increases to buff effects or turn count.

mstList.name: I've Chosen to Keep on Living in This World
mstList.description:
Increases DMG dealt to wounded enemies by 24%.
On follow-up attack, increases ATK by 2% (Stacks 10 times / 2 turns).

mstList.name: I Did It to Protect My World
mstList.description:
Increases DMG dealt by 3% (Effect scales based on how many enemies there are; max 15%).
On special attack, increases ATK by 3% (Stacks 5 times).

mstList.name: I've Gotta Fulfill My Wish
mstList.description:
If under 50% HP, decreases DMG taken by 10%.
On basic attack, increases SPD by 10 (1 turn).

mstList.name: All Right, Time for Me to Make My Move!
mstList.description:
Decreases DMG taken from enemies with 1 or more debuffs by 15%.
On battle skill use, increases critical rate by 20% (2 turns).

mstList.name: I'll Protect My New Home
mstList.description:
Applies the effect "If own HP 80% or higher, increases DEF by 10%" to all allies.
At battle start, advances action order by 30%.

mstList.name: I'm Not Afraid of Anything Anymore
mstList.description:
On battle skill use, increases all allies' DMG dealt when targeting elemental weakness by 20% (2 turns). * Not affected by increases to buff effects or turn count.
On basic attack, increases SPD by 10% (1 turn). * Not affected by increases to buff effects or turn count.

mstList.name: I Know You Don't Want to Be Alone
mstList.description:
On battle skill use, decreases DMG taken by 20% (2 turns).
Increases DMG dealt when targeting an enemy's elemental weakness by 25%.

mstList.name: There's No Way I'll Ever Regret It
mstList.description:
Increases counterattack break gauge depletion.
Adds 1 turn to barrier.

mstList.name: I Want to Be Able to Protect Her!
mstList.description:
Increases special attack DMG dealt by 10%.
On battle skill use, grants 5 MP.

mstList.name: I Want to Be Someone Else
mstList.description:
On enemy break, advances own action order by 20%.
On basic attack, increases SPD by 10% (1 turn).

mstList.name: I'm Gonna Be Brave!
mstList.description:
On battle skill use, grants 15 MP.
When at least 3 enemies are present, increases special attack DMG dealt by 30%.

mstList.name: I Want to Stand on My Own Two Feet!
mstList.description:
If under 40% HP, increases SPD by 15%.
Decreases DMG taken by 20%.

mstList.name: My Very Best Friend
mstList.description:
Increases critical rate by 15%.
On battle skill use, increases critical DMG by 5% (Stacks 5 times).

mstList.name: Because I've Decided to Protect
mstList.description:
Increases all allies' critical rate by 10%.
Increases ATK for all allies with regeneration by 10%.

mstList.name: I Can Make Miracles Happen Too!
mstList.description:
On basic attack, increases SPD by 10% (1 turn). * Not affected by increases to buff effects or turn count.
On special attack, grants 5 MP.

mstList.name: Do Not Underestimate Us
mstList.description:
On DMG dealt to an enemy, grants 1 Magic.
When 5 or more debuffs are applied to enemies, increases SPD by 15%.

mstList.name: We'll Just Have to Push Through!
mstList.description:
At battle start, grants 40 MP.
Decreases DMG taken by 2% (Effect scales based on how many enemies there are; max -10%).

mstList.name: Space Is My Special Thing!
mstList.description:
On basic attack when 3 or more buffs are applied to self, advances action order by 10%.
Increases follow-up attack break gauge depletion.

mstList.name: Whatever I Can Do as a Teller of Tales
mstList.description:
When at least 2 poisoned enemies are present, grants 5 MP at turn start.
Increases DMG dealt by self-applied ailments by 15%.

mstList.name: Thank Me Once You Die
mstList.description:
At battle start, increases SPD by 10% (1 turn; effect scales based on how many enemies there are; max 50%).
Increases follow-up attack break gauge depletion.

mstList.name: It Isn't Summer Without a Few Thrills
mstList.description:
On basic attack, applies shield (10% / 1 time).
When at 5 Magic, increases forest DMG dealt by 25%.

mstList.name: My Summer Break's Just Getting Started!
mstList.description:
Increases vortex DMG dealt by 25%.
On basic attack, advances action order by 10%.

mstList.name: To Protect Our Memories of This Summer
mstList.description: Increases DMG dealt when targeting elemental weakness by 15% and HP recovery amount by 20% for self or ally with active shield.

mstList.name: Allow Me to Guide You!
mstList.description:
Increases special attack DMG dealt by 25%.
On basic attack, decreases DMG taken by 10% (1 turn).

mstList.name: I Think I'd Like to Help People
mstList.description:
Increases MP recovery rate by 10%.
While Swallow's Providence is applied to self, decreases DMG taken by 10%.

mstList.name: | I Have to Protect Them, No Matter What |
mstList.description: Increases own critical rate by 10% and follow-up attack critical DMG by 20%.

mstList.name: Results Will All Be Good
mstList.description: At battle start, grants 1 Magic. On basic attack, advances action order by 10%.

mstList.name: That Is Why I Will Keep Fighting
mstList.description:
Increases critical DMG by 20%.
When all enemy sigils total 10 or more:
Increases SPD by 10%.

mstList.name: This One's on the House
mstList.description:
Increases HP recovery amount by 20%.
If own HP 80% or higher, decreases own DMG taken by 20%.

mstList.name: Something I Didn't Want to Give Up
mstList.description: Increases critical rate by 20%, and on critical hit, increases break gauge depletion (1 turn), and increases break bonus by 30% (1 turn).

mstList.name: Would You Like a Sweet Treat?
mstList.description:
Increases ongoing DMG dealt by 40%.
On attack to Candyholic enemy, increases own ATK by 2% (2 turns; max 10 stacks).

mstList.name: This Will Make Some Beautiful Art
mstList.description:
Increases ongoing DMG dealt by 20%.
On ongoing DMG dealt, increases SPD by 2% (2 turns; max 5 stacks; max 1 time on ongoing DMG dealt).

mstList.name: Turned Out to Be a Wonderful Film
mstList.description:
On basic attack, grants 2 MP.
While Invisible is applied to self:
On taking at least 1 DMG from an enemy attack, advances action order by 5%.

mstList.name: I'll Get the Gifts Out in Time!
mstList.description:
On battle skill use, grants 5 MP.
When at least 1 ally has Yuletide Gleam, increases SPD by 2%. (Effect increases based on how many allies with Yuletide Gleam are present, max 10%). * Not affected by increases to buff effects.

mstList.name: Santa Makes Miracles
mstList.description:
On battle skill use, increases own SPD by 2% (2 turns; max 5 stacks).
On follow-up attack, increases own ATK by 5% (2 turns; max 5 stacks).

mstList.name: May Everyone Enjoy a Happy Holiday
mstList.description:
Decreases DMG taken by 10%.
Increases SPD by 4% (Effect scales with the number of enemies; max 20%).

mstList.name: Let's Make It Snow in Kamihama!
mstList.description:
Decreases DMG taken by 15%.
On special attack, grants 10 MP.

mstList.name: Pray for Good Health and Peace for All
mstList.description:
On battle skill use, restores own HP by 3% of user's HP.
On special attack, advances own action order by 10%.

mstList.name: I Won't Just Give up on Myself
mstList.description:
On battle skill use, increases critical rate by 20% (2 turns).
On own critical hit, advances own action order by 10%.

mstList.name: I'll Keep Going, No Matter What
mstList.description:
At battle start, grants 3 Magic.
When attacked, increases DEF by 2% (Max 10 stacks).

mstList.name: I Am Now an Existence Known as Evil
mstList.description: Increases special attack DMG dealt by 20%, and on Spatial Sundering activation, grants 10 MP.

mstList.name: I Just Wanted to Eat Cheese One More Time
mstList.description:
At battle start, grants 5 Magic.
While Curious Cheese is applied, decreases DMG taken by 10%.

mstList.name: Have a Bite of This Super Sweet Cake!
mstList.description:
Increases critical rate by 20%.
On DMG dealt to an enemy in break, increases break bonus by 30% (2 turns), and advances action order by 5%.

mstList.name: Don't Sneak Any Bites
mstList.description:
On basic attack, advances action order by 5%.
While Donut of Love is applied, decreases DMG taken by 10%.

mstList.name: The Power to Bring Light to All of France!
mstList.description:
At battle start, increases SPD by 50% (1 turn).
On special attack, grants 5 MP.

mstList.name: Time for a Lovely Bloodbath!
mstList.description:
Increases DMG dealt when targeting elemental weakness by 20%.

On own attack to enemy with at least 2 debuffs:
Increases ATK by 2% (2 turns; max 10 stacks).

mstList.name: I Want To Save Everyone
mstList.description:
Increases critical rate by 10%.

While own forest field active:
Decreases DMG taken by 10% and increases SPD by 10%.

mstList.name: If There's No Other Way, Fine
mstList.description:
Increases break gauge depletion, and increases break bonus by 30%.

While Abyssal Rose is applied:
Decreases DMG taken by 10%.

mstList.name: All Shall Bow Before My Blades
mstList.description:
Increases DMG dealt by 20%.
Increase HP recovery amount by 10%.

mstList.name: That Attack Can Just Get Lost!
mstList.description:
Increases Max HP by 10%, and increases chance of being targeted.
On special attack, increases SPD by 10% (2 turns).

mstList.name: Let's Kick Them to the Curb
mstList.description:
Increases break bonus by 5% (Effect scales based on how many enemies there are; max 25%).
On enemy break, increases MP by 10%.

mstList.name: I Won't Let the Light Go Out
mstList.description:
Increases MP recovery rate by 10%.

On battle skill use:
Increases all allies' DMG dealt by 20% (2 turns).

mstList.name: I'll Make Sure You Pay
mstList.description:
Increases own follow-up attack DMG dealt by 40%.

On own follow-up attack:
Decreases target's all elemental RES by 2.5% (Stacks 4 times).

mstList.name: I'll Save It All, No Matter What!
mstList.description:
On triggering Ombre et Lumière, increases ATK by 5% (Stacks 4 times).
Increases DMG dealt when targeting elemental weakness by 10%.

mstList.name: Now for Your Punishment
mstList.description:
Increases critical rate by 20%.
On own special attack, increases SPD by 15% (2 turns).

mstList.name: I Won't Run from My Past
mstList.description:
On battle skill use, increases SPD by 5% (Stacks 2 times).
On own DMG dealt to an enemy in break, grants 5 MP.

mstList.name: Could You Take Your Squabble Off the Island?
mstList.description:
When a Kyubey Blast enemy is present, increases SPD by 10%.
On own follow-up attack, grants 5 MP.

mstList.name: It's a Guava! They're Pretty Tasty!
mstList.description:
On own special attack while Beachball's Boon is applied to self, grants 3 MP.
Decreases DMG taken by 5% for self and Attacker allies with Beachball's Boon.

mstList.name: Experiment Successful
mstList.description:
Increases ongoing DMG dealt by 25%.

When 1 or more debuffs are applied to enemies:
Increases DMG dealt by 5% (Effect scales with the number of debuffs; max 20%).

mstList.name: This Is Like, Peak Me!
mstList.description:
Increases all allies' HP recovery amount by 20%.
On taking DMG equal to 20% or higher of own max HP, advances action order by 20%.

mstList.name: That's a New Personal Best
mstList.description: On own follow-up attack, increases critical DMG by 10% (2 turns) and SPD by 10% (2 turns).
